basePrompt: Completely original digital combat monster in classic 1990s-early 2000s 2D anime style, hand-drawn cel-shaded look. Aggressive but readable silhouette, segmented armor, glowing energy circuits, bold black outlines, flat colors with simple cel-shading, dynamic battle pose, digital energy effects, high quality 2D anime illustration on clean background.
avoid: Do not copy existing franchise characters, names, logos, symbols, exact silhouettes or armor layouts. Avoid realistic metallic textures, heavy 3D rendering, text, watermark and brand references.
